message:
feat(e2e): Add governor vs baseline E2E harness (bd-zsoh)

Deterministic harness comparing Lyapunov-governed scheduling against
baseline across three scenarios: cancellation fanout, deadline pressure,
and obligation debt. Verifies invariants (no leaks, quiescence),
monotone V(Σ) decrease, convergence, deterministic fingerprints, and
regression thresholds on step counts. Includes negative-control test
proving identical seeds produce identical reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
